title: rorippa sylvestris subsp. kerneri
intro: Rorippa sylvestris subsp. kerneri, also known as Kern's watercress, is a subspecies of watercress native to the Iberian Peninsula. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Kern's watercress include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Rorippa sylvestris subsp. kerneri include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
